markdown:
#  How do I filter out 'Recycled' items from a custom RFIs report? 
##  Answer 
If you have created a custom report where RFIs from the Recycle Bin are showing in a custom RFIs report, you can edit the report and then remove the checkmark from the 'Recycled' box associated with the **Status** filter.
## See Also
  * [What visual types can I create with 360 Reporting Visuals and Dashboards? (Beta)](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-visual-types-can-i-create-with-360-reporting-visuals-and-dashboards)
